args.sql:
SELECT
    kommunenummer AS kommunenummer,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS kommune_geom_geojson
FROM
    kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE
    LOWER(administrativenhetnavn) = LOWER('Drammen');

args.sql:
SELECT
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS flood_zone_geom_geojson
FROM
    flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal
WHERE
    symbolflom = '200' AND
    ST_Intersects(
        omrade,
        ST_Transform(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON('{"type":"MultiPolygon","coordinates":[[[[10.1,59.1],[10.2,59.1],[10.2,59.2],[10.1,59.2],[10.1,59.1]]]]}'), 25833)
    );

WHERE
